message:
feat(fwc): add SimulateCapability and truthful preflight vs dry-run contract

Introduce SimulateCapability enum (FullDryRun, PreflightOnly, Unknown,
Unsupported) to separate real connector simulation from host-level
preflight. Add SimulateResult for honest labeling of what actually
happened, evaluate_simulate_request() for gating simulation requests,
and simulate_result_payload() for structured output.

Key invariants enforced:
- PreflightOnly never labels output as connector dry-run
- Unknown/Unsupported capabilities refuse simulation requests
- Downgrade flag only set when dry-run was requested but unavailable
- All results carry non-empty caveats explaining scope

Adds 25 new tests covering capability semantics, serde round-trips,
evaluate/refuse logic, honest result labeling, payload shape, and
cross-cutting no-false-simulation invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
